content:
🚀 We're Hiring: Principal Associate 
Are you a passionate educator who also loves leading teams? We're looking for someone who can do both, teach brilliantly and lead confidently.

📌 Role: Principal Associate (Teaching + Team Leadership)
 📍 Location: Remote
 💼 Experience: 5–6 years in teaching/training, incl. 1–2 years leading a team
This is a hybrid role for someone who thrives at the intersection of hands-on classroom delivery and people management.

What you'll do:
 ✅ Deliver live classes/training sessions regularly
 ✅ Lead, mentor & manage a team of educators/trainers
 ✅ Monitor performance & uphold delivery quality standards
 ✅ Champion AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude & similar) to boost teaching efficiency
 ✅ Spot process gaps and drive improvements
 ✅ Partner with cross-functional teams on planning & delivery
 ✅ Own escalations and keep day-to-day operations running smoothly

What we're looking for:
 🔹 5–6 years of teaching/training with active session-delivery experience
 🔹 Hands-on familiarity with AI tools for content creation & lesson planning
 🔹 Proven ability to manage and motivate a team
 🔹 Sharp analytical & problem-solving skills
 🔹 Excellent communication

The ideal candidate is intellectually sharp, a fast learner, and can run classes and lead a team with minimal oversight.

💰 Compensation: Competitive, commensurate with experience
 📍 Location: Remote

Interested? Drop a comment or DM me.
Tag someone who'd be a great fit! 👇

#Hiring #RemoteJobs #EdTech #TeachingJobs #TrainingJobs #NowHiring #AIinEducation #TeamLead
